temporal_description:
The audio is filled with a low, mournful, and atmospheric musical score. A slow, melancholic melody, played on what sounds like a cello or a similar string instrument, creates a somber and suspenseful mood. The music is deep and resonant, evoking a sense of unease and anticipation, as if building up to a significant or dramatic moment. There is no dialogue or other sound effects, allowing the haunting music to dominate the soundscape.

The scene opens on a man with a spiky, dark mohawk hairstyle. He is shown in profile, looking down with a somber expression. He wears a dark denim jacket over a floral shirt, a red bandana, and a silver chain necklace. An earring is visible in his left ear. The man is in a dimly lit indoor space with a strong greenish-blue color cast. In the background, a window with horizontal blinds is visible but out of focus. The watermark "风行网" appears in the top right corner of the screen. The camera is positioned in a medium close-up, focusing on the man's profile. The shot is slightly shaky, suggesting handheld camera work.

The man with the mohawk remains the central focus. He continues to look down, his expression unchanged. The camera angle shifts slightly, revealing more of the person standing next to him, who is wearing a light blue denim jacket. The setting remains the same, with the greenish lighting and the blurred background of the window and blinds. The "风行网" watermark is still present in the top right corner. The camera pans slightly to the left, following the man's subtle movements and revealing more of the person beside him.

The shot cuts to a different man, viewed through what appear to be vertical bars, like a jail cell or a security gate. This man has short, dark hair and is looking intently off-camera with a serious, focused expression. He is wearing a denim jacket. The background is dark and indistinct, with a cool, blue-green light illuminating the man. The vertical bars in the foreground create a sense of confinement. The "风行网" watermark is visible in the top right corner. The camera is in a close-up on the man's face, framed by the bars. The shot is steady.

The camera pulls back slightly, showing the man with the mohawk from the first scene walking away from the camera. In the background, another man in a white collared shirt and a dark tie comes into view, standing and looking in the same direction. The setting is the same dimly lit interior. The background is now more visible, showing a hallway or room with fluorescent lighting. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. The camera is stationary, capturing the two men in the same frame as they move through the space.
